name: POI-triggered lockdown / scenario
description: When a Verkada person-of-interest detection fires, automatically lock down doors. Pick either path on first edit: swap the action for **Verkada: Activate Access scenario** to fire a configured Command scenario (Lockdown / Shelter / Evacuate), or keep **verkada_api_call** and point it at a specific door-lockdown endpoint from the API catalog for a single-door action.
summary: POI webhook → activate scenario OR call a lockdown endpoint
